# qsl differential-testing fixture: command stream + events + rejections + snapshot
version 1
meta seed 17 symbols 3 orders 120 max_qty 20 max_notional 1000

cmd reg S1
cmd reg S2

reject new_limit 1 UnknownSymbol

reject modify 2 UnknownOrder
